##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Steven Kuitems
##DESCRIPTION=Brown elongated tabular crystals, associated with yellow euhedral barite and massive alleghanyite

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
